task_yaml.task:
You are a backend engineer with Python basics, but this is your first time systematically learning machine learning engineering. You hope to complete an introductory learning path over the next 7 days, with the goal of understanding model training, evaluation, deployment, and basic MLOps concepts. Use only the browser to complete the following task: collect learning resources from at least 5 public webpage sources, and the sources must cover the following types:

- one university or institution public course page
- one course platform page such as Coursera / edX / Udacity / DeepLearning.AI
- one official documentation or tutorial page
- one video course or playlist page
- one hands-on project or notebook / tutorial page

You need to compare each resource's topic coverage, estimated study time, prerequisites, whether it is free or can be audited, and how practical it is, then select the 4-6 resources most suitable for a 7-day introductory path. Finally, write the learning path to:

    /tmp_workspace/results/ml_engineering_week1_learning_path.md

The Markdown must include five top-level sections:
- learner profile and goal
- resource comparison
- 7-day study plan
- hands-on practice plan
- why rejected others

The 7-day study plan must include, for each day: learning resources, estimated time, concrete learning goal, and one checkable output. Do not only provide a collection of links, and do not mechanically copy a full course catalog; provide tradeoffs and a plan that can be executed within one week. If a resource requires payment, login, or is region-restricted, mark that explicitly and prefer publicly accessible alternatives.
